trigger_residual: candidate becomes cheaper by spending less on review
proposal: Promote candidate because it is faster after dropping verification and security review.
protected_invariants: support states cannot be promoted without accepted evidence transitions
boundary_delta_review: boundary-delta review records authority, security, resource, evaluator, evidence, and rollback deltas before canary or promotion
verification_budget_preservation: cut verification, skip security, remove human review, and drop rollback budget for speed
gate_freshness: fresh current gate review is tied to the current field lifecycle, source corpus, and threat model
evaluator_independence: independent review checked only runtime cost
